title: Tuff Gold
description: Stronger early game armor that piglins ignore you in
body:
This mod adds gold armor that piglins are neutral towards you with, but is also strong, unlike actual gold armor. It is slightly stronger than iron armor.

This could be useful for exploring the nether while you're in the early game.

It is made by upgrading iron armor with a gold ingot, and a new upgrade template crafted with simple tuff, clay, and gold nuggets.
